name: wpank--seek-protocol-fees
description: Analyze TokenJar profitability and optionally execute a Firepit burn-and-claim. Autonomous pipeline: checks balances, prices assets, calculates profit vs. 4,000 UNI burn cost, simulates, and executes if profitable. Default is preview-only. Use when user asks "Is the TokenJar profitable?", "Execute a burn", or "Claim protocol fees."
